assistiveListening.label: Assistive Listening
assistiveListening.desc: Hearing assistance available in seating area

companionTicket.label: Companion Ticket
companionTicket.desc: Free companion or PA ticket available

viewingPlatform.label: Viewing Platform
viewingPlatform.desc: Elevated viewing platform for wheelchair users

hands-on-signing.label: Hands-on signing room
hands-on-signing.desc: A quiet space where interpreters can work hands-on with Deafblind attendees.

guide-support.label: Sighted-guide support
guide-support.desc: Trained guides available to assist Deafblind or low-vision attendees from arrival to seat.

low-stim-space.label: Low-stimulation space
low-stim-space.desc: A quieter, lower-light area away from the main event for sensory regulation.

large-print.label: Large-print materials
large-print.desc: Programmes, signage or wayfinding available in large print on request.

royal concert hall nottingham.address: Theatre Royal & Royal Concert Hall, South Street

bookingSteps.text: Purchase your tickets (including your PA ticket) from the event page or AXS box office.
To get your PA ticket refunded, scan your proof of eligibility to boxoffice@ovoarena.co.uk with your order number and show name.
Email customerservices@ovoarena.co.uk to let the Access Team know you need a BSL interpreter. Include your booking details and CC admin@performanceinterpreting.co.uk so we can follow up.

ovo arena wembley.note: OVO Arena requires you to buy your PA ticket and then apply for a refund separately. See booking steps below.

circus starr.note: Circus Starr provides FREE tickets for disabled, vulnerable, or additional-needs children and their families. You apply — you do not buy.

bookingSteps.text: Visit circus-starr.org.uk/apply-for-tickets and fill in the application form.
Tickets are allocated first-come first-served. You'll be contacted if successful.
For group bookings (schools/organisations), email community@circus-starr.org.uk or call Jo on 01260 288690.
